attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT --work
MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_DETAIL_KEY ,  
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_DETAIL_KEY,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ) + COALESCE(RK.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY, WIGL_REV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,0) REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
SUBQ.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
SUBQ.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
SUBQ.PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,
-9999 AS AR_TRX_KEY,
-9999 AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
-9999 AS BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
-999 AS	END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
-999 AS	BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
-999 AS	SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
-999 AS	SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SUBQ.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
-9999 AS DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
SUBQ.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
'UNKNOWN' AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,
-9999 AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
-999 AS	BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
-999 AS	BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
SUBQ.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS	DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
SUBQ.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD AS	DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
SUBQ.DD_GL_DATETIME AS DD_GL_DATETIME,
NULL AS	DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
SUBQ.DV_FISCAL_DT AS DV_FISCAL_DT,
NULL AS	DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
NULL AS DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0))  AR_TRX_DATETIME,
'IND_ADJ' AS REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
SUBQ.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
'Y' AS DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
'Y' AS DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
'N' AS DV_CHARGES_FLG,
'N' AS DV_MISC_FLG,
'N' AS DV_SERVICE_FLG,
'N' AS DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
'N' AS DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
'Y' AS DV_REVENUE_FLG,
0 AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
0 AS DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
0 AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
SUBQ.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
0 AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
0 AS DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
0 AS DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
SUBQ.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
0 AS DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
0 AS DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
0 AS DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
'R2A COGS' AS BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
'COGS' AS BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,
SUBQ.GL_DT AS GL_DT,
NULL AS BK_SS_CD,
0 AS DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
0 AS GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
0 AS GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
NULL AS OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
'ADJ' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
'ADJ' AS TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
NULL AS WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
SUBQ.TRANSACTION_DT AS TRANSACTION_DT,
SUBQ.GL_POSTED_DTM AS GL_POSTED_DTM,
NULL AS RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD AS DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD, /* Added is part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
0 AS DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,/* Added is part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
0 AS DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT, /* ADDED IS PART OF  Q3FY15 ICPM AS ICMS FIX*/
'UNKNOWN' AS DV_ERP_DEAL_ID,
CASE WHEN SO.XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN SO.XCAT_FLG ELSE COALESCE(NP1.XCAT_FLG,'N') END AS  XCAT_FLG_DRVD , /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
COALESCE(OMAP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,'Others' )  AS BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME, /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
COALESCE(OMAP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG ,'N' ) AS RECURRING_OFFER_FLG, /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
COALESCE((CASE WHEN XCAT_FLG_DRVD='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE OMAP.ELA_FLG END),'N') AS ELA_FLG,  /* RO proj, Q3FY17  16th March release*/
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE,
RFDP.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT AS DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT  /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
FROM
(
/* FOR BTS ENABLED TRANSACTIONS */
SELECT
NMTD.MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_DETAIL_KEY,
/*priyavij: Modified as a part of BTS option class changes*/ 
COALESCE(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)) AS  SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
COALESCE(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,  
COALESCE(NAB.PRODUCT_KEY,NMT.RU_TAN_ITEM_KEY) AS PRODUCT_KEY, 
 /*priyavij: End of code change*/
NST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS	SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
NMTD.BK_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD, 
CAST(NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS DD_GL_DATETIME,
NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT AS DV_FISCAL_DT,
(NMTD.RU_DR_USD_AMT+NMTD.RU_CR_USD_AMT) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
(NMTD.RU_DR_USD_AMT+NMTD.RU_CR_USD_AMT) AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT AS GL_DT,
NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT AS TRANSACTION_DT,
CAST(NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT	AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS GL_POSTED_DTM,
'UNKWOWN' AS DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD
/*priyavij: Added as a part of BTS option class changes*/
FROM 
(
SELECT NMT.RU_TAN_ITEM_KEY,
NMT.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY,
NMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY,
NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT,
NMT.RU_BK_GEOGRAPHIC_LOCATION_CD,
NMT.R2A_STOCK_TYPE,
NMT.RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,
CASE WHEN NMT.RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR LIKE '%R2A%' 
THEN SUBSTR(NMT.RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,INDEX(NMT.RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'|')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(NMT.RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR)) ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS FIELD1,

CASE WHEN NMT.RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR LIKE '%R2A%' AND FIELD1 LIKE '%|%' 
THEN SUBSTR(FIELD1,INDEX(FIELD1,'|')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(FIELD1)) ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS FIELD2,

CASE WHEN NMT.RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR LIKE '%R2A%'  AND FIELD2 LIKE '%|%' 
THEN SUBSTR(FIELD2,INDEX(FIELD2,'|')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(FIELD2)) END AS FIELD3,

CASE WHEN NMT.RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR LIKE '%R2A%'  AND FIELD3 LIKE '%|%' 
THEN SUBSTR(FIELD3,INDEX(FIELD3,'|')+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(FIELD3)) END AS FIELD4,

CASE WHEN NMT.RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR LIKE '%R2A%'  AND FIELD4 LIKE '%|%' 
THEN SUBSTR(FIELD4,1,INDEX(FIELD4,'|')-1) END AS SO_NUM,

CASE WHEN NMT.RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR LIKE '%R2A%'  AND FIELD4 LIKE '%|%' 
THEN SUBSTR(FIELD4,INDEX(FIELD4,'|')+1, CHARACTER_LENGTH(FIELD4)) END AS LINE_NUM
FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION NMT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NMT.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG ='Y' 
AND NMT.RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR LIKE '%R2A%')NMT
/*End of code change*/
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_DETAIL NMTD
ON NMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY = NMTD.BK_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY 
and NMTD.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ='Account'
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
ON NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY     = NMTD.BK_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
AND NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NMTD.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM
ON NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT BETWEEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_MTH_CNTL_AS CNTL  
ON CNTL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_R2_GEOGRAPHIC_LOCATION SRGL
ON ( NMT.RU_BK_GEOGRAPHIC_LOCATION_CD = SRGL.BK_GEOGRAPHIC_LOCATION_CD) 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY NST
ON NST.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = SRGL.GEOGRAPHIC_REGION_CD
AND NST.DV_SALES_TERR_LEVEL_NUM_INT=1
AND NST.BK_SALES_HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE'
/*priyavij: Added as a part of BTS option class changes*/
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT TRIM(BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)||'-'||TRIM(BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT) AS PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT, SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, SALES_ORDER_KEY,PRODUCT_KEY
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT ORDER BY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ASC) =1
) NSOL
ON NSOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT = NMT.SO_NUM
AND NSOL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT =NMT.LINE_NUM
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON NP.ITEM_KEY = NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY 
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY,INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY, PRODUCT_KEY from $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_AS_BLT_BOM_PRDT_LNK_PST_ASN
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY,INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY ORDER BY AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY) =1
 ) NAB
ON NAB.SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM = NSOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM
AND NMT.RU_TAN_ITEM_KEY  = NAB.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY
AND NMT.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY = NAB.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
/*End of code changes*/
WHERE NMT.R2A_STOCK_TYPE ='R2A STOCK'

UNION ALL
/* FOR CTO ENABLED TRANSACTIONS */
SELECT
MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_DETAIL_KEY,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
ST.PRODUCT_KEY,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
DD_GL_DATETIME,
DV_FISCAL_DT,
COALESCE(DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,0),
COALESCE(DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,0),
GL_DT,
TRANSACTION_DT,
GL_POSTED_DTM,
DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD
FROM $$STGDB.WI_INV_RV_MEASURE_IND_ADJ_R2A ST
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
) SUBQ
INNER JOIN  ( SELECT MAX(REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY) REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY 
FROM $$WORKDB.W_INV_REV_MEASURE_IND_ADJ )  RK
ON 1=1
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_INV_REVENUE_KEY_CNTL WIGL_REV 
ON WIGL_REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUM_INT = SUBQ.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
/*   added below joins as part of  Q3FY17 RO project*/
/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
ON RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=SUBQ.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDP
ON RFDP.CALENDAR_DATE=COALESCE(CASE WHEN SUBQ.GL_POSTED_DTM < RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE THEN RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE
WHEN SUBQ.GL_POSTED_DTM IS NOT NULL AND SUBQ.GL_POSTED_DTM > RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE THEN RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
ELSE Cast(SUBQ.GL_POSTED_DTM AS DATE) END ,RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)
/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV SO
ON SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SUBQ.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND SO.END_TV_DATETIME= '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP1
ON SUBQ.PRODUCT_KEY=NP1.ITEM_KEY
LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.MT_OFFER_TYPE_PRDT_MAP OMAP
ON OMAP.PRODUCT_KEY = NP1.ITEM_KEY
AND OMAP.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=SUBQ.PRODUCT_KEY
AND OMAP.BK_OFFER_ATTRBTN_TYPE_CD = 'STANDALONE'

SELECT
NMTD.MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_DETAIL_KEY,
NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY AS	PRODUCT_KEY,
NSCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS	SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,  
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NMTD.BK_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD, 
CAST(NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS DD_GL_DATETIME,
NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT AS DV_FISCAL_DT,
/* Cost Derivation for R2A CTO */
CASE WHEN NP.BK_ITEM_TYPE_CODE='SPARE' THEN ((NMTD.RU_DR_USD_AMT+NMTD.RU_CR_USD_AMT)*(NSCA.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100))
	WHEN NAB.CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT IS NOT NULL THEN (NAB.CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT*NMTD.TRANSACTION_DETAIL_QTY*NAB.CONSTITUENT_PART_QTY*(NSCA.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100)) 
		ELSE (TEMP.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT*NMTD.TRANSACTION_DETAIL_QTY*(NSCA.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100)) END AS DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT, 
CASE WHEN NP.BK_ITEM_TYPE_CODE='SPARE' THEN ((NMTD.RU_DR_USD_AMT+NMTD.RU_CR_USD_AMT)*(NSCA.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100)) 
	WHEN NAB.CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT IS NOT NULL THEN (NAB.CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT*NMTD.TRANSACTION_DETAIL_QTY*NAB.CONSTITUENT_PART_QTY*(NSCA.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100)) 
		ELSE (TEMP.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT*NMTD.TRANSACTION_DETAIL_QTY*(NSCA.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100)) END  AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT, 
		/* End of Cost Derivation */ 
				NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT AS GL_DT,
NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT AS TRANSACTION_DT,
CAST(NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT	AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS GL_POSTED_DTM,
'FORWARD' AS DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
NAB.CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT AS CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT,
NMTD.TRANSACTION_DETAIL_QTY AS TRANSACTION_DETAIL_QTY,
NAB.SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM AS SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM
FROM 
(SELECT RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY,DV_TRANSACTION_DT,INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY,
MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY,RU_BK_GEOGRAPHIC_LOCATION_CD,R2A_STOCK_TYPE,
/* Derivation of Sales order number and Sales order line number for R2A CTO */
CASE WHEN RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR LIKE '%R2A%||%'
THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'||')+2,(INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'-') -2 - INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'||'))))
ELSE TRIM(SUBSTR(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'|')+1,(INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'-') -1 - INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'|')))) END AS SO_NUM,

CASE WHEN RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR LIKE '%R2A%' THEN
 SUBSTR(
 TRIM(SUBSTR(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR, INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'-')+1, CHARACTER_LENGTH(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR)-INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'-')) )
 ,INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,1), INDEX(TRIM(SUBSTR(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,
  INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'-')+1, CHARACTER_LENGTH(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR)-INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'-')) ),'|'))
 END AS LINE_NUM
 /* End of Derivation for R2A CTO */
FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION NMT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NMT.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG ='N' 
AND NMT.RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR LIKE '%R2A%||%'
AND NMT.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Account alias') NMT
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_DETAIL NMTD
ON NMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY = NMTD.BK_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY 
AND NMTD.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ='ACCOUNT'
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
ON NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY     = NMTD.BK_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
AND NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NMTD.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM
ON NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT BETWEEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_MTH_CNTL_AS CNTL  
ON CNTL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_R2_GEOGRAPHIC_LOCATION SRGL
ON ( NMT.RU_BK_GEOGRAPHIC_LOCATION_CD = SRGL.BK_GEOGRAPHIC_LOCATION_CD) 
INNER JOIN (
 SELECT TRIM(BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)||'-'||TRIM(BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT) AS PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT, SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, PRODUCT_KEY
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE
WHERE MAJOR_LINE_TYPE = 'MAJOR' AND BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT=0
AND ITEM_TYPE_CODE  IN ('STANDARD')
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT ORDER BY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ASC) =1

) NSOL
ON NSOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT = NMT.SO_NUM
AND NSOL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT = NMT.LINE_NUM
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON NP.ITEM_KEY = NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY 
LEFT  JOIN (SELECT SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY,INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY, COALESCE(CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT,0) AS CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT,CONSTITUENT_PART_QTY FROM
 $$ETLVWDB.EV_AS_BLT_BOM_PRDT_LNK_PST_ASN_R2A) NAB
ON NAB.SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM = NSOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM
AND NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY  = NAB.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY
AND NMT.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY = NAB.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT NMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY AS MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY ,COALESCE(NSC.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT,0) AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION NMT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NMT.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG ='N' 
AND NMT.RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR LIKE '%R2A%||%' AND NMT.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Account alias'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM
ON NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT BETWEEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_MTH_CNTL_AS CNTL  
ON CNTL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_STANDARD_COST NSC
ON NSC.ITEM_KEY = NMT.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY 
AND NSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME = NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE    
AND NSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME <= NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY NMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY ORDER BY NSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME DESC) = 1)TEMP
ON TEMP.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY = NMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY
LEFT JOIN (SELECT SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SUM(SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE) AS SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASSGNMENT_TV
WHERE END_TV_DATETIME = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE IN ('DIRECT SALES','L')
GROUP BY 1,2) NSCA
ON NSCA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NMT.R2A_STOCK_TYPE ='R2A STOCK'

UNION ALL

SELECT
NMTD.MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_DETAIL_KEY,
NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY AS	PRODUCT_KEY,
NSCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS	SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,  
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NMTD.BK_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD, 
CAST(NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS DD_GL_DATETIME,
NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT AS DV_FISCAL_DT,
/* Cost Derivation for R2A CTO */
CASE WHEN NP.BK_ITEM_TYPE_CODE='SPARE' THEN ((NMTD.RU_DR_USD_AMT+NMTD.RU_CR_USD_AMT)*(NSCA.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100))
	WHEN NAB.CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT IS NOT NULL THEN (NAB.CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT*NMTD.TRANSACTION_DETAIL_QTY*NAB.CONSTITUENT_PART_QTY*(NSCA.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100)) 
		ELSE (TEMP.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT*NMTD.TRANSACTION_DETAIL_QTY*(NSCA.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100)) END AS DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT, 
CASE WHEN NP.BK_ITEM_TYPE_CODE='SPARE' THEN ((NMTD.RU_DR_USD_AMT+NMTD.RU_CR_USD_AMT)*(NSCA.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100)) 
	WHEN NAB.CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT IS NOT NULL THEN (NAB.CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT*NMTD.TRANSACTION_DETAIL_QTY*NAB.CONSTITUENT_PART_QTY*(NSCA.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100)) 
		ELSE (TEMP.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT*NMTD.TRANSACTION_DETAIL_QTY*(NSCA.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100)) END  AS DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT, 
/* End of Cost Derivation */ 
NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT AS GL_DT,
NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT AS TRANSACTION_DT,
CAST(NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT	AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS GL_POSTED_DTM,
'FORWARD' AS DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
NAB.CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT AS CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT,
NMTD.TRANSACTION_DETAIL_QTY AS TRANSACTION_DETAIL_QTY,
NAB.SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM AS SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM
FROM 
(SELECT RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY,DV_TRANSACTION_DT,INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY,
MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY,RU_BK_GEOGRAPHIC_LOCATION_CD,R2A_STOCK_TYPE,
/* Derivation of Sales order number and Sales order line number for R2A CTO */
CASE WHEN RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR LIKE '%R2A%||%'
THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'||')+2,(INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'-') -2 - INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'||'))))
ELSE TRIM(SUBSTR(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'|')+1,(INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'-') -1 - INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'|')))) END AS SO_NUM,

CASE WHEN RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR LIKE '%R2A%' THEN
 SUBSTR(
 TRIM(SUBSTR(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR, INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'-')+1, CHARACTER_LENGTH(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR)-INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'-')) )
 ,INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,1), INDEX(TRIM(SUBSTR(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,
  INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'-')+1, CHARACTER_LENGTH(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR)-INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'-')) ),'|'))
 END AS LINE_NUM
 /* End of Derivation for R2A CTO */
FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION NMT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NMT.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG ='N' 
AND NMT.RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR LIKE '%R2A%||%'
AND NMT.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Account alias'
) NMT
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_DETAIL NMTD
ON NMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY = NMTD.BK_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY 
AND NMTD.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ='ACCOUNT'
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
ON NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY     = NMTD.BK_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
AND NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NMTD.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM
ON NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT BETWEEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_MTH_CNTL_AS CNTL  
ON CNTL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_R2_GEOGRAPHIC_LOCATION SRGL
ON ( NMT.RU_BK_GEOGRAPHIC_LOCATION_CD = SRGL.BK_GEOGRAPHIC_LOCATION_CD) 
INNER JOIN (
 SELECT TRIM(BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)||'-'||TRIM(BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT) AS PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT, SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, PRODUCT_KEY
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE
WHERE 
 ITEM_TYPE_CODE NOT  IN ('STANDARD')   and  DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG = 'N'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,PRODUCT_KEY ORDER BY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ASC) =1
) NSOL
ON NSOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT = NMT.SO_NUM
AND NSOL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT = NMT.LINE_NUM
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON NP.ITEM_KEY = NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY 
INNER JOIN (SELECT SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY,INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY, COALESCE(CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT,0) AS CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT,CONSTITUENT_PART_QTY FROM
 $$ETLVWDB.EV_AS_BLT_BOM_PRDT_LNK_PST_ASN_R2A) NAB
ON NAB.SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM = NSOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM
AND NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY  = NAB.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY
AND NMT.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY = NAB.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
INNER JOIN (
SELECT NMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY AS MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY ,COALESCE(NSC.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT,0) AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT, 
NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY,NMT.RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR , NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT

FROM (SELECT RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY,DV_TRANSACTION_DT,INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY,
MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY,RU_BK_GEOGRAPHIC_LOCATION_CD,R2A_STOCK_TYPE,

CASE WHEN RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR LIKE '%R2A%||%'
THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'||')+2,(INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'-') -2 - INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'||'))))
ELSE TRIM(SUBSTR(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'|')+1,(INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'-') -1 - INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'|')))) END AS SO_NUM,

CASE WHEN RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR LIKE '%R2A%' THEN
 SUBSTR(
 TRIM(SUBSTR(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR, INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'-')+1, CHARACTER_LENGTH(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR)-INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'-')) )
 ,INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,1), INDEX(TRIM(SUBSTR(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,
  INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'-')+1, CHARACTER_LENGTH(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR)-INDEX(RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR,'-')) ),'|'))
 END AS LINE_NUM
 ,NMT.RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR 
 ,NMT.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME
 
 /* End of Derivation for R2A CTO */
FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION NMT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NMT.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG ='N' 
AND NMT.RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR LIKE '%R2A%||%'
AND NMT.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Account alias') NMT
INNER JOIN 
(
 SELECT TRIM(BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)||'-'||TRIM(BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT) AS PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT, SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, PRODUCT_KEY
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE
WHERE 
  ITEM_TYPE_CODE NOT  IN ('STANDARD')    AND  DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG = 'N'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,PRODUCT_KEY ORDER BY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ASC) =1
) NSOL
ON NSOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT = NMT.SO_NUM
AND NSOL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT = NMT.LINE_NUM
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NMT.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
AND NCIO.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG ='N' 
AND NMT.RU_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE_DESCR LIKE '%R2A%||%' AND NMT.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME='Account alias'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM
ON NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT BETWEEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_MTH_CNTL_AS CNTL  
ON CNTL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_STANDARD_COST NSC
ON NSC.ITEM_KEY = NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY 
AND NSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME = NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE    
AND NSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME <= NMT.DV_TRANSACTION_DT 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY NMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY, NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY ORDER BY NSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME DESC) = 1)TEMP
ON TEMP.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY = NMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY
AND TEMP.PRODUCT_KEY = NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY
LEFT JOIN (SELECT SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SUM(SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE) AS SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASSGNMENT_TV
WHERE END_TV_DATETIME = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE IN ('DIRECT SALES','L')
GROUP BY 1,2) NSCA
ON NSCA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NMT.R2A_STOCK_TYPE ='R2A STOCK'

SELECT
MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_DETAIL_KEY,
PRODUCT_KEY,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
DD_GL_DATETIME,
DV_FISCAL_DT,
DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
GL_DT,
TRANSACTION_DT,
GL_POSTED_DTM,
DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT,
TRANSACTION_DETAIL_QTY,
SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
CURRENT_DATE AS INSERT_DT
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_INV_RV_MEASURE_IND_ADJ_R2A 
WHERE DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD='FORWARD'

SELECT 
REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
,XCAT_FLG                      
,BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
,RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
,ELA_FLG                       
,NEW_XCAT_FLG                  
,NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME        
,NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG       
,NEW_ELA_FLG  
,'N' AS XCAT_FLG_UPD 
,'Y' AS MAP_FLGS_UPD                
FROM $$STGDB.WI_INV_RORTRO_MAP_FLG_R2ADJ MAPFLG 
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1
FROM $$STGDB.WI_INV_RORTRO_XCT_MP_FLG_R2ADJ CMN
WHERE CMN.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = MAPFLG.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND CMN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = MAPFLG.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND CMN.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = MAPFLG.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
)

SELECT
REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
,GL.XCAT_FLG                      
,GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
,GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
,GL.ELA_FLG                       
/* ,NSO.XCAT_FLG AS NEW_XCAT_FLG  */
,(CASE WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSO.XCAT_FLG ELSE  NP.XCAT_FLG END) AS NEW_XCAT_FLG/*  added as part of april9th2017 */                 
,GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME AS NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME  /*  added as part of april9th2017 */         
,GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG AS NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG	/*  added as part of april9th2017 */         
,GL.ELA_FLG AS NEW_ELA_FLG	/*  added as part of april9th2017 */         
,'Y' AS XCAT_FLG_UPD
,'N' AS MAP_FLGS_UPD
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REVENUE_MEASURE GL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
ON GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  = RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
ON GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON GL.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY
WHERE NSO.END_TV_DATETIME = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
AND GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'IND_ADJ'
/* commenting this condition as part of IND_ADJ retro May21st2017---start
AND GL.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD = 'R2A COGS'
---end */
AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 3
AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE >= 0
AND NSO.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME >( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WK_INV_REVENUE_MEASURE_R2A_ADJ' AND TABLE_NAME ='WI_INV_RORTRO_XCT_MP_FLG_R2ADJ' )
AND GL.XCAT_FLG <> (CASE WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSO.XCAT_FLG ELSE  NP.XCAT_FLG END)
AND 1=2

UNION 
SELECT
REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
,GL.XCAT_FLG                      
,GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
,GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
,GL.ELA_FLG                       
/* ,NP.XCAT_FLG AS NEW_XCAT_FLG  */
,(CASE WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSO.XCAT_FLG ELSE  NP.XCAT_FLG END) AS NEW_XCAT_FLG/*  added as part of april9th2017 */     
,GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME AS NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
,GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG AS NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG
,GL.ELA_FLG AS NEW_ELA_FLG
,'Y' AS XCAT_FLG_UPD
,'N' AS MAP_FLGS_UPD
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REVENUE_MEASURE GL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
ON GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  = RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
ON GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON GL.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY
WHERE NSO.END_TV_DATETIME = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
AND GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'IND_ADJ'
/* commenting this condition as part of IND_ADJ retro May21st2017---start
AND GL.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD = 'R2A COGS'
---end */
AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 3
AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE >= 0
AND NP.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME >( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WK_INV_REVENUE_MEASURE_R2A_ADJ' AND TABLE_NAME ='WI_INV_RORTRO_XCT_MP_FLG_R2ADJ')
AND GL.XCAT_FLG <> (CASE WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSO.XCAT_FLG ELSE  NP.XCAT_FLG END)
AND 1=2

SELECT
GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
,GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,GL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,GL.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,GL.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,GL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,GL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
,CASE WHEN GL.END_CUSTOMER_KEY<0 THEN -999 ELSE GL.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY               
,GL.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,GL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,GL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,GL.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    
,GL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,GL.SALES_REP_NUMBER              
,GL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
,GL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  
,GL.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       
,GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    
,GL.DD_GL_DATETIME                
,GL.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        
,GL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME            
,GL.DV_FISCAL_DT                  
,GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
,GL.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD          
,GL.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD 
,GL.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD            
,GL.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD       
,GL.AR_TRX_DATETIME               
,GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
,GL.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         
,GL.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      
,GL.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             
,GL.DV_CHARGES_FLG                
,GL.DV_MISC_FLG                   
,GL.DV_SERVICE_FLG                
,GL.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     
,GL.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       
,GL.DV_REVENUE_FLG                
,GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      
,GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
,GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM
,GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       
,GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      
,GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        
,GL.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     
,GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     
,GL.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
,GL.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY           
,GL.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY         
,GL.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,GL.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           
,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           
,GL.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         
,GL.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD    
,GL.GL_DT                         
,GL.BK_SS_CD                      
,GL.DV_EXTENDED_QTY               
,GL.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     
,GL.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  
,GL.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        
,GL.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              
,GL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  
,GL.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   
,GL.TRANSACTION_DT                
,GL.GL_POSTED_DTM                 
,GL.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
,GL.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,GL.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE           
,GL.DV_FMV_FLG                    
,GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     
,GL.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT        
,GL.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT   
,GL.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME          
,GL.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID                
,CMN.NEW_XCAT_FLG AS XCAT_FLG                 
,CMN.NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME AS BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME       
,CMN.NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG AS RECURRING_OFFER_FLG      
,CMN.NEW_ELA_FLG AS ELA_FLG
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE
,'I' AS DML_TYPE
,GL.DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT  /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE GL,
$$STGDB.WI_INV_RORTRO_XCT_MP_FLG_R2ADJ CMN
WHERE
GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=CMN.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  = CMN.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
AND GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = CMN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_INV_REV_MEASURE_IND_ADJ WGL
WHERE  WGL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = CMN.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY 
AND WGL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = CMN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
AND WGL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = CMN.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD)

SELECT 
GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
,GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
,GL.XCAT_FLG AS XCAT_FLG                
,GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
,GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
,GL.ELA_FLG                       
,GL.XCAT_FLG AS NEW_XCAT_FLG                  
,OMAP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME AS NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME        
,OMAP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG AS NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG       
,CASE WHEN NEW_XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE OMAP.ELA_FLG END  AS NEW_ELA_FLG          
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REVENUE_MEASURE GL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
ON GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  = RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_OFFER_TYPE_PRDT_MAP OMAP
ON  GL.PRODUCT_KEY = OMAP.PRODUCT_KEY
AND GL.DV_PRODUCT_KEY= OMAP.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
AND GL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD = OMAP.BK_OFFER_ATTRBTN_TYPE_CD 
WHERE GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'IND_ADJ'
/* commenting this condition as part of IND_ADJ retro May21st2017---start
AND GL.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD = 'R2A COGS'
---end */
AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 3
AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE >= 0 
AND OMAP.EDW_UPDATE_DTM >( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WK_INV_REVENUE_MEASURE_R2A_ADJ' AND TABLE_NAME ='WI_INV_RORTRO_MAP_FLG_R2ADJ')
AND ( GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME <>OMAP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME 
OR GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG <> OMAP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG
OR GL.ELA_FLG <>( CASE WHEN NEW_XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE OMAP.ELA_FLG END)
)
AND 1=2
